title: CleanupApplyRequest
description: Inputs for the cleanup_apply skill (CCW-MVP13). Applies a JSON cleanup plan to the filesystem.

plan_path.description: Path or glob pattern to a JSON cleanup plan file. Plan format: {operations: [{action, source, dest}]}

plan.description: Inline cleanup plan dict (alternative to plan_path). Takes precedence if both are supplied.

root.description: Repository root for path resolution. Paths outside root are refused.

dry_run.description: When true (default), no filesystem changes are made.

allow_delete.description: When false (default), delete operations are skipped with a warning.

on_conflict.description: Conflict resolution strategy when destination already exists.

write_report.description: When true, write a JSON report to report_dir.
